ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Update – Insights & Deals Inside!
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

Hope you're having a great week! Here are the latest trends, exclusive offers, and top picks from our marketing team.

Highlights this week:
- New product line: Eco-Friendly Mugs – 20% off (use code ECO20).
- Webinar: Digital Marketing for SMEs – Register now.
- Customer spotlight: Rohan Sharma from Mumbai – 5-star review.

Aapka feedback humare liye bahut important hai. Reply to this email or visit our community page for more: <URL>.

Thank you for being part of our community.

Best regards,
Marketing Team
XYZ Company

spam.subject: URGENT: CEO Gift Card Verification Required
